rationale: The cited paper is strongly topically aligned with the citing paper’s core mechanism: both center on how consumers justify indulgence ("earning/deserving the right to indulge") and examine indulgent versus restrained/luxury choices. With this conceptual overlap, it should be retained for full relation judgment.
